payload.text: ขอปรับเปลี่ยน เอารายการ จัดการข้อมูลแผนก ออกจากหน้า  Navigation

**Considering Menu Modifications**

I'm currently focused on removing the "Manage Department Information" menu item. Initial code examination of `App.tsx` confirms it houses the sidebar structure. I'm strategizing the most elegant way to remove this section, potentially using a conditional render or a config-based approach, and identifying any possible dependencies. I am now working on understanding all aspects of dependencies.


**Isolating Button Code**

I've pinpointed the exact button code within `App.tsx` responsible for the "จัดการข้อมูลแผนก" functionality; it's around line 208. The next step is to isolate and remove it while preserving the structure of the sidebar menu, which can be done by conditionally rendering it. I'm aiming for a clean and adaptable solution.


**Refining Menu Accessibility**

I've decided to remove the direct link to department management and rely on the existing "เพิ่มแผนก" button within the grid and the modal accessible through "Database Access" at the sidebar's bottom. I'm confirming that the intended effect is achieved by restricting access to the department management menu via its sidebar button and that functionality remains via the "เพิ่มแผนก" button.


**Clarifying Navigation Points**

I've re-evaluated the user's intent. The focus is removing "จัดการข้อมูลแผนก" from the "Analytics Hub" section within the sidebar navigation, which, in this app, serves as the main navigation. I've located the button code within `App.tsx` and am now preparing to remove the associated element while keeping the rest of the navigation structure intact. I'll need to do some more work to ensure there are no other places.


**Analyzing Button Interactions**

I'm now examining the direct button interaction code within `App.tsx`, specifically lines related to the button triggering `setIsCollectionLocked(false)`. I want to understand how this function call affects the overall application state. I'm focusing on "จัดการข้อมูลแผนก" functionality within the component, understanding how to adjust related conditional renders or configuration data, which will guide my removal strategy. I am thinking through all the side effects.

entries.description: นำปุ่ม "จัดการข้อมูลแผนก" ออกจากเมนูหลักในแถบด้านข้าง (Sidebar Navigation) ตามคำขอของผู้ใช้งาน
